title: File Review Process for HAIROTICMEN Project

outputs.title: File Review Process for HAIROTICMEN Project
outputs.summary: Establish a structured review process for all critical and pending asset categories to ensure timely approvals and unblock project progress.
outputs.content: To review the files effectively, create a step-by-step workflow that assigns ownership, sets deadlines, and defines approval criteria for each asset category needing review. Prioritize assets based on project blockers such as brand guidelines, pricing documents, legal documents, and product videos. Use collaborative tools to share files with reviewers and collect feedback. Schedule review meetings if necessary to resolve ambiguities. Track review status and escalate delays promptly.
outputs.analysis: Currently, multiple critical assets for the HAIROTICMEN project are marked as 'Needs Review,' creating bottlenecks. Without approved brand guidelines, pricing, legal documents, and product videos, marketing execution cannot proceed efficiently. A clear review process with defined roles and timelines is essential to unblock these assets and maintain project momentum.
findings: Connected integrations in context: website, instagram, facebook, tiktok, youtube, Instagram, Facebook, Tiktok.
recommendations: Assign specific team members as reviewers for each asset category based on expertise.
Set clear deadlines for each review phase to maintain accountability.
Use a centralized platform for file sharing and feedback collection to streamline communication.
Prioritize review of brand guideline, pricing, legal, and product video assets to unblock critical paths.
Schedule periodic status check-ins to monitor progress and address blockers.
nextActions: Identify and assign reviewers for each asset category needing review.
Communicate deadlines and expectations to all reviewers.
Set up a shared review workspace with access to all relevant files.
Initiate the first round of reviews focusing on brand guideline, pricing, legal, and product videos.
Organize a kickoff meeting to clarify review process and answer questions.
Track review progress and send reminders as deadlines approach.
Route the strongest outcome into Workflows.

routeSuggestions.label: Brand & Legal Team Workspace
routeSuggestions.reason: Assign brand guideline, legal documents, and pricing documents review to specialized teams here.

routeSuggestions.label: Creative & Media Team Workspace
routeSuggestions.reason: Route product videos, social assets, and campaign materials for review and feedback.

routeSuggestions.label: Project Management Workspace
routeSuggestions.reason: Centralize review tracking, deadlines, and communication for all asset categories.

routeSuggestions.label: Workflows
routeSuggestions.reason: Operations Planner output is best actioned in Workflows.

routeSuggestions.label: Task Center
routeSuggestions.reason: Save a durable execution task if an operator follow-up is needed.

tasks: Task: Assign reviewers for each asset category; Owner: Project Manager; Deadline: 2024-06-10
Task: Communicate review deadlines and criteria; Owner: Project Manager; Deadline: 2024-06-11
Task: Set up shared review workspace with all files; Owner: Operations Coordinator; Deadline: 2024-06-12
Task: Conduct kickoff meeting for review process; Owner: Project Manager; Deadline: 2024-06-13
Task: Begin first round of reviews focusing on critical assets; Owner: Assigned Reviewers; Deadline: 2024-06-20
Task: Track review progress and send reminders; Owner: Project Manager; Deadline: 2024-06-20

milestones: Date: 2024-06-20; Milestone: First Round Reviews Completed

owners.Operations Coordinator: Sets up review workspace and manages file access
owners.Creative Team: Reviews product videos and campaign assets

handoffs: Project Manager to Brand, Legal, and Creative Teams for review tasks
Reviewers back to Project Manager with feedback and approvals
approvals: Project Manager to approve completed reviews before asset finalization
dependencies: Reviewers must be assigned before workspace setup and kickoff meeting
Kickoff meeting must occur before reviews begin
Reviews must be completed before final approvals
